text:
Hi Toast hiring team,

I'm applying for the Senior Enterprise Process Engineer role.

Deep C#/.Net history: 25+ years across .Net Framework + .Net Core (versions 2.0 through 9), recently at Lockheed Martin (.Net 4.8 + AngularJS + PrimeNG + NgRx) and iDox Solutions (.Net Core 8/9 + C# + TypeScript on Power Platform migration).

What drew me to Toast: the role description (dotnet, senior) maps to work I've shipped recently and architecture decisions I've owned end-to-end.

I'm based in Castle Hayne NC; remote works well for me, and I'm open to fully remote.

Resume + a few of the OSS projects mentioned above attached / linked. Happy to walk through any of the work in a call.

Kevin Luddy
Castle Hayne, NC
github.com/kevin-luddy39

prompt: Job listing open. Click the APPLY button on the page → company portal opens. Cover letter is in clipboard (Ctrl+V where needed). Don't forget to attach resume. Auto-pause 15s, you don't need to do anything here.
